svg.title: Voice Assistant Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the pipeline from browser client through FastAPI server, STT provider, Agent agentic loop with sequential stages 1 through 6, and TTS provider, with HA MCP Client and RAG MCP integrations.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the WebSocket audio streaming work?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI server do?')
sendPrompt('How does the Deepgram STT integration work?')
sendPrompt('How are Home Assistant actions executed?')
sendPrompt('How does LLM action planning work?')
sendPrompt('How does the retry and clarify stage work?')
sendPrompt('How does the HA MCP Client work with the Home Assistant Native MCP?')
sendPrompt('How does the RAG MCP work for device retrieval?')
sendPrompt('How does the Cartesia TTS streaming work?')
